name: Moon
text: I could have sworn she had returned here...

name: Moon
text: It was the place where I had hurt her... where our chase began...

name: Moon
text: From the very beginning, all I wanted was to see her smiling forever...
What was that about seeing me smiling?

name: Selkie
text: I didn't stop smiling because of you. It wasn't your fault.

name: Selkie
text: You did everything for me. I know how hard it is for you to refuse to help

name: Moon
text: Selkie...

name: Selkie
text: I pushed you past your limits... It's why you keep running...

name: Moon
text: I'm running to catch up to you! To reach you!

name: Selkie
text: And now that we've found each other again, what are you going to do?

name: Selkie
text: We can't keep this game up forever.

name: Selkie
text: Eventually, my sins will catch up with me. Eventually, you'll slip.

name: Moon
text: Eventually, you'll finally see fit to end my despair.

name: Selkie
text: Our mutual despair, dearest sunset...

name: Moon
text: And you know that I'll never let that be mutual.

name: Selkie
text: Why wouldn't it be? Everything else is.

name: Moon
text: It's not despair to chase you, sunrise.

name: Moon
text: It's the only thing that keeps me going.

name: Moon
text: So, I'll keep going.

name: Selkie
text: Very well...
